task.name: Action Budget & Coordination Model
task.description: Implement the action budget model where trade execution costs actions for both parties, coordination (propose/accept/reject) is free, and agents use pre-computed fallbacks when proposals fail.

vision_extraction.primary_goal: Implement action budget model where trade costs actions, coordination is free, and failed proposals trigger fallback execution
success_criteria: Trade consumes 1 action for both proposer and acceptor
Failed proposals allow proposer to execute fallback
Acceptance determined by opportunity cost comparison
Cooldowns triggered only by explicit rejection
Cooldown targets excluded from utility calculations

context.gap_analysis_summary: Current implementation has ProposeAction without fallback, acceptance checks surplus > 0 not opportunity cost, and no fallback execution when proposals fail. Cooldown triggers are partially correct (explicit rejection only).

phases.name: Core Mechanics
phases.description: Implement ProposeAction fallback, opportunity cost acceptance, and fallback execution in simulation loop
phases.exit_criteria: Core mechanics implemented and unit tested
phases.gate_verification: ProposeAction has fallback field, acceptance uses opportunity cost, fallback executes on rejection

phases.name: Integration & Polish
phases.description: Cooldown exclusion from search, comprehensive tests, edge cases
phases.exit_criteria: All tests pass, edge cases handled
phases.gate_verification: Full test coverage, all scenarios from verification design pass

gate_checks.1->2: Core mechanics verified: ProposeAction.fallback exists, evaluate_proposal uses opportunity cost, _execute_actions runs fallback on rejection

features.name: ProposeAction fallback field
features.description: Add optional fallback: Action field to ProposeAction. Fallback is MoveAction or WaitAction, never ProposeAction.

functional: ProposeAction accepts fallback parameter
Fallback defaults to None (backward compatible)
Fallback must be MoveAction or WaitAction (validation)

features.name: Compute fallback in choose()
features.description: Update RationalDecisionProcedure.choose() to compute fallback when primary action is ProposeAction

functional: When best action is ProposeAction, fallback = MoveAction toward target
If target is at same position (adjacent), fallback = WaitAction
Fallback stored in ProposeAction.fallback field
property: Fallback always set when returning ProposeAction
theory: Fallback pre-computed from perceive-time information per AGENT-ARCHITECTURE.md 7.2

features.name: Store opportunity cost in agent state
features.description: During choose(), compute and store agent's opportunity cost (best alternative's discounted surplus) for use in acceptance check

functional: Agent has _opportunity_cost attribute set during choose()
Opportunity cost = discounted surplus of best alternative target
Opportunity cost = 0 when agent chose WaitAction

features.name: Opportunity cost acceptance check
features.description: Update evaluate_proposal() to accept iff trade_surplus >= opportunity_cost

functional: evaluate_proposal reads agent._opportunity_cost
Returns True iff surplus >= opportunity_cost
Agent with better alternative rejects mediocre proposal
theory: Acceptance is institutional constraint per AGENT-ARCHITECTURE.md 7.9

features.name: Fallback execution on proposal failure
features.description: Update _execute_actions() to execute proposer's fallback when proposal is rejected or not selected

functional: Explicit rejection: cooldown added, fallback executed
Implicit non-selection: no cooldown, fallback executed
Fallback MoveAction causes movement
Fallback WaitAction causes no movement
property: Proposer either trades OR executes fallback (never both, never neither)
theory: Failed proposals don't waste action budget per AGENT-ARCHITECTURE.md 7.4

features.name: Cooldown exclusion from search
features.description: Update search/evaluation to exclude agents on cooldown from consideration

functional: evaluate_targets_detailed skips cooldown targets
available_actions excludes ProposeAction for cooldown targets
Cooldown targets not in visible_agents evaluation
theory: Cooldown targets excluded from utility calculations per AGENT-ARCHITECTURE.md 7.2

features.name: Theory verification tests
features.description: Comprehensive tests verifying behavior matches AGENT-ARCHITECTURE.md

functional: Test: trade costs both parties' action (neither can move)
Test: failed proposal -> fallback executes
Test: acceptance = surplus >= opportunity_cost
Test: explicit rejection -> cooldown
Test: implicit non-selection -> no cooldown

features.name: Scenario tests
features.description: Test the 5 key scenarios from verification design

functional: A proposes to B, B accepts -> both trade, neither moves
A proposes to B, B rejects -> A moves (fallback), cooldown added
A and C propose to B, B accepts A -> A+B trade, C moves (no cooldown)
A proposes to B, B proposes to A -> mutual trade
A proposes to B while on cooldown -> blocked

features.name: Edge case handling
features.description: Handle edge cases identified during design

functional: Fallback-is-TradeIntent substituted with WaitAction
Agent at same position as target: fallback = WaitAction
Multiple proposals to same target processed correctly

resolved.choice: Substitute WaitAction when fallback would be ProposeAction
resolved.rationale: Avoids recursive fallback complexity; pragmatic simplification for initial implementation

resolved.choice: Extend ProposeAction with optional fallback field
resolved.rationale: Minimal disruption to existing code; MoveAction/WaitAction don't need fallback

resolved.choice: Store in agent state during Decide phase
resolved.rationale: Simple access during Execute phase; pre-computed per architecture spec

escalation_triggers: Test failures suggesting semantic regression in existing functionality
Modifications to core agent/simulation architecture beyond scope
